maxRange.name: Maximum range (grid units)
maxRange.hint: Beyond this many grid spaces (Foundry ruler units). One unit = one map cell.

gmVoiceGlobal.name: GM voice: full volume everywhere
gmVoiceGlobal.hint: When enabled, the GM is always heard at full volume (no proximity). When disabled, the GM uses token proximity like everyone else.

throughWallGain.name: Voice through walls
throughWallGain.hint: GM only (world setting). How much volume remains after a Normal sound wall. 1 = no muffling; lower = quieter through walls.

muteUnresolvedSpeaker.name: Mute voice when speaker token unknown
muteUnresolvedSpeaker.hint: When enabled, a player whose speaking position cannot be placed on the map is inaudible to other players (GM still hears them). When disabled (default), they are heard at full volume until a token exists — avoids “GM hears me, players don’t.”

toggleGMVoiceGlobal.name: Toggle GM voice (global vs token proximity)
toggleGMVoiceGlobal.hint: GM only: switch between global GM voice and token-based proximity.

toggleVoiceToken.name: Toggle voice token (selected)
toggleVoiceToken.hint: With a token selected, set or clear that token as your voice position. Default: Ctrl+Shift+V.

VOICE.cannotPick: You can only set your voice token to a token you own.
VOICE.needSelection: Select a token first (control it), then use the voice token keybinding.
